title: transaction — trait composition
description: Two owned traits. `BelongsToTransaction` is the FK trait for downstream models (TransactionLedgerEntry). `HasLedgerEntries` is the inverse-side convenience on the Transaction model, exposing scoped query helpers (->balancedEntries(), ->debitEntries(), ->creditEntries(), ->entriesForAccount()). Order matters when composed with BelongsToTenant — tenant MUST come first so the scope chain observes the tenant context.

owned.description: Mixed into any downstream model that carries a `transaction_id` FK. Adds the `transaction()` belongsTo relation. Only used by TransactionLedgerEntry currently — no downstream module currently attaches to transactions directly. Provides a `resolveInTransaction(?Transaction)` scope for cross-cutting queries.
usedBy: transaction::TransactionLedgerEntry (required transaction_id — every ledger entry anchored to exactly one transaction)
composition_notes: Order: `BelongsToTenant` must appear BEFORE `BelongsToTransaction` in the trait list so the tenant scope resolves first.
Refuses to save a row whose transaction_id points at a transaction in a different tenant than the row itself (defense-in-depth against cross-tenant FK smuggling; returns LEDGER_ENTRY_CROSS_TENANT).
Refuses to save a row whose parent transaction.status != 'draft' (ledger entries attach ONLY during transaction creation; returns LEDGER_ENTRY_PARENT_TRANSACTION_POSTED).

owned.description: Composed onto the Transaction model itself. Adds `->ledgerEntries()` (hasMany over TransactionLedgerEntry), `->balancedEntries()` (returns entries with a computed running balance), `->debitEntries()` (scope filter debit_cents > 0), `->creditEntries()` (scope filter credit_cents > 0), `->entriesForAccount($account)` (filter by account), `->sumDebits()` + `->sumCredits()` (used by the observer's balance check). Also adds `->isBalanced()` boolean helper.

foundation.reason: Transaction only. TransactionLedgerEntry does NOT carry metadata — the description field is auto-generated + bounded to 256 chars.
Transaction (searchable by transaction_number). NOT TransactionLedgerEntry (accessed via relations from Transaction only).

tenants.reason: Every owned row carries tenant_id per tenancy-columns.md §3.

audit.reason: Every write to transactions + transaction_ledger_entries is compliance-critical (SOX 404 + AML + regulator record retention). 7-year audit retention.

activity.reason: Transaction only (Wave 4.5 will roll up ledger movements onto the tenant admin activity feed). NOT TransactionLedgerEntry — line items are too high-volume for the activity feed + already covered by the transaction-level entry.

transaction.notes: Order matters: BelongsToTenant precedes every scope-observing trait. HasLedgerEntries is an inverse-side convenience. NO SoftDeletes — transactions are append-only (immutable after post); hard-purged by PurgeExpiredTransactionDataJob only after archive-to-compliance-storage. NO HasMetadata::mutable — the metadata field is IMMUTABLE after create per the observer's updating refusal (all updates refused).

transaction_ledger_entry.notes: NO SoftDeletes — ledger entries are append-only. NO HasActivityLog — high-volume + already covered by the transaction-level entry. NO HasMetadata — the description field is auto-generated. NO Searchable — accessed via parent transaction only. Auditable is critical — every entry is a regulator-visible row.
